response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, GIS, ad-tech) with strong craftsmanship values (TDD, CI/CD, testing). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, A/B testing infrastructure, or telemetry/metrics platforms — which are the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Title progression also doesn't clearly demonstrate Principal-level scope or multi-team platform leadership required for IC6.
strengths: 15+ years polyglot engineering experience (TS, Node, C/C++, Java, DLang) meeting language requirements
High-scale low-latency systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of req/sec
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev, workshops, open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience
Lacks evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-team platform leadership or measurement systems ownership
No clear data science/statistical analysis or metrics infrastructure background

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot engineering breadth and tenure
Unclear Principal-level scope and platform leadership
